class-catalog.html.name: Class Catalog
class-catalog.html.desc: All 28 playable classes — portrait, 7-pose sprite strip, role, armor, primary attribute, full skill list with MP cost + unlock level, and class passive tree. Reads live from data-source.js (same source the in-game screens use).

companion-catalog.html.name: Companion Catalog
companion-catalog.html.desc: All companions — class pets, hireables, wild companions, and dragon companions. Sortable table with stat columns.

dungeon-catalog.html.name: Dungeon Catalog
dungeon-catalog.html.desc: Side-branch dungeons: name, zone, stages, mini-boss, rewards. Card grid with click-to-expand.

status-effect-catalog.html.name: Status Effect Catalog
status-effect-catalog.html.desc: Full glossary of all status effects with glyph, color, plain-language description. Grouped by category.

achievement-roadmap.html.name: Achievement Roadmap
achievement-roadmap.html.desc: All achievements sorted by tier (bronze / silver / gold). Unlock conditions and rarity.

index.html.name: Asset Gallery
index.html.desc: All generated images, audio, and milestone reports. The main /assets/ landing page.

affix-survey.html.name: Affix Survey
affix-survey.html.desc: Visual survey of all item affixes — prefixes, suffixes, and shield-only affixes.

bg-remove.html.name: BG Remove
bg-remove.html.desc: Batch background removal for sprite images using the remove.bg API.

brainstorm.html.name: Brainstorm
brainstorm.html.desc: Design brainstorm and planning notes for upcoming milestones.

character-redesign.html.name: Character Redesign
character-redesign.html.desc: Submit characters for full SpriteCook redesign pipeline. Reference art + 7 canonical poses.

custom-content.html.name: Custom Content
custom-content.html.desc: Author custom mod content via the JSON DSL — enemies, items, quests.

docs.html.name: Documentation
docs.html.desc: Design and reference docs — image policy, schema reference, mod authoring.

enemy-audit.html.name: Enemy Audit
enemy-audit.html.desc: Audit enemy stats against act-tier benchmarks. Highlight outliers and balance issues.

enemy-catalog.html.name: Enemy Catalog
enemy-catalog.html.desc: All enemies by act — stats, loot tables, status-on-hit effects.

image-review.html.name: Image Review
image-review.html.desc: Review pending sprite images — approve, reject, or flag for regeneration.

item-catalog.html.name: Item Catalog
item-catalog.html.desc: All weapon and armor bases with stat ranges, categories, and affix eligibility.

mod-system-report.html.name: Mod System Report
mod-system-report.html.desc: Status of the mod authoring pipeline — supported ops, known limits, shelf items.

privacy.html.name: Privacy
privacy.html.desc: Privacy policy and data handling disclosure for Emberveil.

rebalance.html.name: Rebalance
rebalance.html.desc: Interactive balance sliders — adjust enemy and loot multipliers, preview changes.

rebalance-report.html.name: Rebalance Report
rebalance-report.html.desc: Auto-generated balance analysis report comparing milestones.

redesign-survey.html.name: Redesign Survey
redesign-survey.html.desc: Prioritize characters for the SpriteCook redesign pipeline.

skill-audit.html.name: Skill Audit
skill-audit.html.desc: Audit class skills — mpCost, damage multipliers, talent coverage, missing descriptions.

spell-catalog.html.name: Spell Catalog
spell-catalog.html.desc: All class skills and spells — sorted by class, type, and MP cost.

sprite-adjust.html.name: Sprite Adjust
sprite-adjust.html.desc: Per-character sprite visual adjustment — offset, scale, flip overrides.

sprite-flip-review.html.name: Sprite Flip Review
sprite-flip-review.html.desc: Archived — review sprite horizontal flips. Superseded by Sprite Adjust.

sprite-replace.html.name: Sprite Replace
sprite-replace.html.desc: Upload replacement sprites for characters in bulk.

wishlist.html.name: Wishlist
wishlist.html.desc: Feature and bug wishlist organized by milestone target. Track status of every request.

roadmap.html.name: Roadmap
roadmap.html.desc: Milestone roadmap — completed and upcoming milestones.

changelog.html.name: Changelog
changelog.html.desc: Full categorized changelog by feature area.

null.name: Prompts Master
null.desc: Planned M301 — master prompt template library for SpriteCook and AI content generation.

affix-matrix.html.name: Affix Interaction Matrix
affix-matrix.html.desc: Visualizes how prefix/suffix affixes stack across slots. Heatmap of compatible combinations.

ai-content-gen.html.name: AI Content Generator
ai-content-gen.html.desc: Generate dialogs, lore, and item names through the AI pipeline. Prompts driven by templates.

asset-pipeline-trace.html.name: Asset Pipeline Trace
asset-pipeline-trace.html.desc: Trace each generated image through SpriteCook → review → approval → live. Used to debug pipeline drift.

balance-report.html.name: Balance Report
balance-report.html.desc: Monte-Carlo win-rate report comparing pre/post per Act with chart.js. Runs from balance-snapshot.cjs output.

redesign-archive.html.name: Character Redesign Archive
redesign-archive.html.desc: Snapshot history of the per-class re-designs (M217-era anchors). Read-only reference.

combat-replay.html.name: Combat Replay
combat-replay.html.desc: Replay logged combats turn-by-turn. Useful for debugging skill ordering and damage roll edge cases.

data-catalogs.html.name: Data Catalogs (Legacy)
data-catalogs.html.desc: Old combined catalog landing page. Superseded by per-category catalog pages.

data-overrides.html.name: Data Overrides
data-overrides.html.desc: Upload custom JSON to override any catalog data type. Overrides persist via localStorage.

tools.html.name: All Tools (Index)
tools.html.desc: This page. Live index of every tool, catalog, and admin page.

infinite-dungeon.html.name: Infinite Dungeon Catalog
infinite-dungeon.html.desc: Reference for the procedurally-generated post-game dungeon — floor scaling, modifiers, reward curves.

image-review-v2.html.name: Image Review V2
image-review-v2.html.desc: Unified image catalog + pending-review queue. Replaces image-review.html and character-redesign.html.

news-archive.html.name: News Archive
news-archive.html.desc: Index of all milestone reports / dev news posts.

rebalance-diff.html.name: Rebalance Diff
rebalance-diff.html.desc: Diff viewer for the M205 rebalance arc — before/after enemy stats, hero curves, item drops.

skill-sim.html.name: Skill Interaction Simulator
skill-sim.html.desc: Run hypothetical skill rotations against a dummy target to see damage/heal output and status interactions.

status-matrix.html.name: Status Effect Matrix
status-matrix.html.desc: Cross-reference of status interactions (e.g. burn + bleed stacking, dazed vs stun mechanics).

deprecated-affix-survey.html.name: Affix Survey (deprecated)
deprecated-affix-survey.html.desc: Archived. Superseded by Affix Interaction Matrix.

deprecated-enemy-audit.html.name: Enemy Audit (deprecated)
deprecated-enemy-audit.html.desc: Archived. Outdated — use Enemy Catalog instead.

deprecated-image-review.html.name: Image Review (deprecated)
deprecated-image-review.html.desc: Archived. Replaced by Image Review V2.

deprecated-redesign-survey.html.name: Redesign Survey (deprecated)
deprecated-redesign-survey.html.desc: Archived. Superseded by Image Review V2 character pose grid.
